---
title: "lme_t_contrast"
generated: true
description: "Per-voxel t-test of a mixed-model fixed-effect contrast $c^T  beta = 0$."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.stats.lme.reml`](../nitrix-stats-lme-reml.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:lme_t_contrast -->
```python
lme_t_contrast(result: 'Union[REMLResult, LMEResult]', contrast: Float[Array, 'p'], *, dof: ContrastDof = 'satterthwaite', X: Optional[Float[Array, 'N p']] = None, Z: Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']] = None) -> LMEContrast
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:lme_t_contrast -->
Per-voxel t-test of a mixed-model fixed-effect contrast $c^T \beta = 0$.

The standard error is $sqrt(c^T (X^T V^{-1} X)^{-1} c)$ from the fitted
`result.fixed_cov`; the denominator degrees of freedom are
**Satterthwaite** (the default, `dof='satterthwaite'`):

    df = 2 (c^T C c)^2 / (g^T Cov(theta_hat) g),
    g_k = d(c^T C c)/dtheta_k = w^T M_k w,   w = C c

using the per-voxel `theta_cov` / `grad_m` the fit already formed
(`_varcomp.varcomp_inference`).  cuSOLVER-free and differentiable.

`dof='kr'` instead applies the **Kenward-Roger** small-sample correction:
the adjusted covariance `Phi_A` (inflated for variance-component
uncertainty) and the scaled-`F` denominator df, with `t = sign(effect)
sqrt(F_KR)` on `df = m`.  KR rebuilds the rotated basis, so the original
design must be re-passed as `X=` / `Z=` (the compressed `REMLResult`
does not retain it); see `._kr`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:lme_t_contrast -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `result` | `'Union[REMLResult, LMEResult]'` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | A `REMLResult` (`reml_fit` / R1) **or** the R2 `LMEResult` (`lme_fit` with a random slope) -- both carry the `fixed_cov` / `theta_cov` / `grad_m` inference fields the Satterthwaite df consumes (audit D3-R2). `dof='kr'` is R1-only. |
| `contrast` | `Float` | `p` | ‚Äî | `(p,)` contrast vector `c` over the fixed effects. |
| `dof` | `ContrastDof` | ‚Äî | `'satterthwaite'` | `'satterthwaite'` (default) or `'kr'` (Kenward-Roger, R1-only; pass `X` / `Z`). |
| `X` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'N p']]` | ‚Äî | `None` | The original fixed / random design -- required for `dof='kr'`. |
| `Z` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']]` | ‚Äî | `None` | The original fixed / random design -- required for `dof='kr'`. |

**Returns** `LMEContrast`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:lme_t_contrast -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
